technology.title: Do you want to build a robot snowman?
technology.summary: On the latest episode of the Equity podcast, we recapped CEO Jensen Huang’s GTC keynote and debated what it means for Nvidia’s future.

briefing.news_focus: On the latest episode of the Equity podcast, we recapped CEO Jensen Huang’s GTC keynote and debated what it means for Nvidia’s future.
briefing.news_focus_zh: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang 在 GTC 大會上的主題演講引發了對公司未來的討論，特別是其在機器人技術和人工智慧領域的潛力。
briefing.background: Nvidia 作為全球領先的圖形處理單元（GPU）製造商，近年來積極擴展其在人工智慧和機器學習領域的影響力。GTC 大會是該公司展示新技術和未來願景的重要平台。隨著市場對 AI 應用需求的增加，Nvidia 的策略調整可能會影響整個科技產業的發展方向。
briefing.analysis: Nvidia 的未來發展將受到多方利益的影響。首先，投資者期望公司能在 AI 和機器人技術上持續創新，以維持其市場領導地位。其次，競爭對手如 AMD 和 Intel 也在加碼 AI 領域，可能會對 Nvidia 造成壓力。此外，開發者和企業客戶對於新技術的需求將影響 Nvidia 的產品策略。若能成功推出創新產品，將進一步鞏固其市場地位。

technology.title: US Takes Down Botnets Used in Record-Breaking Cyberattacks
technology.summary: The Aisuru, Kimwolf, JackSkid, and Mossad botnets had infected more than 3 million devices in total, many inside home networks, according to the US Justice Department.

briefing.news_focus: The Aisuru, Kimwolf, JackSkid, and Mossad botnets had infected more than 3 million devices in total, many inside home networks, according to the US Justice Department.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國司法部宣布成功摧毀Aisuru、Kimwolf、JackSkid和Mossad四個大型機器人網絡，這些網絡共感染超過300萬台設備，許多位於家庭網絡中，標誌著對網絡安全的重大進展。
briefing.background: 隨著數位化進程加速，網絡攻擊事件日益頻繁，特別是針對家庭和小型企業的攻擊。這些機器人網絡通常被用於發動分散式拒絕服務攻擊（DDoS），對網絡基礎設施造成嚴重威脅。美國政府在過去幾年中加強了對網絡犯罪的打擊，並推出多項政策以提升網絡安全防護。
briefing.analysis: 此次行動標誌著美國在打擊網絡犯罪方面的重大進展，特別是在針對家庭網絡的攻擊上。與先前的行動相比，此次摧毀的機器人網絡規模更大，且涉及的設備數量創下新高。這不僅顯示出美國政府在網絡安全上的決心，也可能促使其他國家加強對類似威脅的應對措施。未來，隨著網絡攻擊手法的演變，各國可能需要進一步合作以應對日益複雜的網絡安全挑戰。

technology.title: New court filing reveals Pentagon told Anthropic the two sides were nearly aligned — a week after Trump declared the relationship kaput
technology.summary: Anthropic submitted two sworn declarations to a California federal court late Friday afternoon, pushing back on the Pentagon's assertion that the AI company poses an "unacceptable risk to national security" and arguing that the government's case relies on technical misunderstandings and claims that were never actually raised during the months of negotiations.

briefing.news_focus: Anthropic submitted two sworn declarations to a California federal court late Friday afternoon, pushing back on the Pentagon's assertion that the AI company poses an "unacceptable risk to national security" and arguing that the government's case relies on technical misunderstandings and claims that were never actually raised during the months of negotiations.
briefing.news_focus_zh: Anthropic向加州聯邦法院提交的宣誓聲明反駁五角大廈對其的國家安全風險指控，並指出政府的論點基於技術誤解及未曾在談判中提出的主張。
briefing.background: Anthropic是一家專注於人工智慧的公司，近年來在AI技術的發展上受到關注。美國政府對於AI技術的監管日益嚴格，尤其是在國家安全方面。特朗普政府時期對科技公司與政府的關係持保守態度，近期的政策變化可能影響到AI公司的運作與發展。此事件發生在特朗普宣佈與五角大廈的關係破裂後，顯示出政府與科技公司之間的緊張局勢。
briefing.analysis: Anthropic與五角大廈的對峙反映出政府對AI技術的擔憂與企業對於自身技術的辯護。五角大廈認為Anthropic的技術可能對國家安全構成威脅，而Anthropic則主張這些指控缺乏實質依據，並強調其在談判中的透明度。此事件可能導致政府在AI監管政策上進一步收緊，或促使企業在技術開發上更加謹慎，未來雙方的關係將取決於如何解決這些誤解。

politics.title: Israel says investigating whether own soldiers shot civilian on Lebanon border
politics.summary: Israel’s military said it was investigating whether its own fire killed an Israeli civilian near the Lebanese border on Sunday, after Hezbollah claimed an attack in the same area. Israeli emergency workers said earlier on Sunday that a man was killed in a “direct hit” on his car by a rocket from Lebanon. Lebanon’s Iran-backed Hezbollah militant group said after the incident that its fighters had attacked Israeli soldiers in the same area. But the Israeli army later said it was “conducting a...

Israeli emergency workers said earlier on Sunday that a man was killed in a “direct hit” on his car by a rocket from Lebanon. Lebanon’s Iran-backed Hezbollah militant group said after the incident that its fighters had attacked Israeli soldiers in the same area. But the Israeli army later said it was “conducting a...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 以色列軍方正在調查是否因自家士兵的火力導致一名以色列平民在黎巴嫩邊境遇害，該事件發生在真主黨宣稱在同一地區攻擊以軍後不久。
briefing.background: 以色列與黎巴嫩的緊張關係由於真主黨的存在而持續升溫，該組織受到伊朗的支持，並經常與以色列軍隊發生衝突。近期，邊境地區的衝突頻繁，雙方都在加強軍事部署。這一事件的發生，正值以色列與黎巴嫩之間的緊張局勢加劇，並引發國際社會的關注。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件的調查顯示以色列軍方對於自我行動的透明度與責任感，這在過去的衝突中並不常見。若調查結果確認是以色列士兵誤擊，將可能引發國內外對以色列軍事行動的質疑，並加劇與黎巴嫩的緊張局勢。另一方面，真主黨的聲明可能會被視為挑釁，進一步激化雙方的敵對情緒，未來可能導致更大規模的軍事衝突。

Why is Israel attacking Lebanon? | Explained

politics.title: Philippine military uncovers alleged new Beijing spy tactics in South China Sea row
politics.summary: At least three Filipinos with ties to the country’s military have been arrested on suspicion of spying for Beijing, allegedly leaking information that sparked maritime confrontations in the disputed South China Sea. The case, which came to light last year during an ongoing multi-agency counter-intelligence effort, marks a new strategy of recruiting Filipinos for espionage instead of planting individuals with fake local identities in the country, according to Philippine Navy Rear Admiral Roy...

briefing.news_focus: At least three Filipinos with ties to the country’s military have been arrested on suspicion of spying for Beijing, allegedly leaking information that sparked maritime confrontations in the disputed South China Sea. The case, which came to light last year during an ongoing multi-agency counter-intelligence effort, marks a new strategy of recruiting Filipinos for espionage instead of planting individuals with fake local identities in the country, according to Philippine Navy Rear Admiral Roy...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 菲律賓軍方逮捕至少三名與軍方有關的菲律賓人，涉嫌為北京從事間諜活動，洩露導致南海爭端的情報。此案件揭示了北京新的間諜招募策略，改為招募本地人而非假冒身份者。
briefing.background: 南中國海的領土爭端涉及多國，包括中國、菲律賓、越南等，長期以來引發緊張局勢。菲律賓政府在面對中國的擴張行為時，積極加強國防與情報工作。此次事件的曝光，正值菲律賓多機構反間諜行動的背景下，顯示出對外部威脅的高度警覺。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件標誌著中國在南海的間諜策略出現新變化，從以往的假身份者轉向直接招募當地人，這可能使得情報收集更為有效。對於菲律賓而言，這不僅是國家安全的警示，也可能引發民眾對於外國勢力滲透的擔憂，進一步影響對中國的外交政策。此事件可能促使菲律賓加強國內反間諜措施，並尋求更多國際支持以對抗外來威脅。

supporting_titles: China could use new law against Taiwanese: MAC
Taiwan’s New Southbound 2.0: Rewiring the Indo-Pacific Beyond China

politics.title: US may ‘escalate to de-escalate’ attacks against Iran, says Scott Bessent
politics.summary: The United States may need to “escalate” its attacks against Iran to be able to wind down the war, US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said on Sunday, after US President Donald Trump gave seemingly contradictory trajectories for the US military campaign. Trump on Saturday threatened to “obliterate” Iranian energy plants if Tehran did not fully open the pivotal Strait of Hormuz, just a day after saying US objectives were “very close” and that he was considering “winding down” the war. Asked on...

briefing.news_focus: The United States may need to “escalate” its attacks against Iran to be able to wind down the war, US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said on Sunday, after US President Donald Trump gave seemingly contradictory trajectories for the US military campaign. Asked on...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國財政部長斯科特·貝森特表示，美國可能需要加大對伊朗的攻擊，以便最終能夠結束戰爭。這一言論出現在特朗普總統對美軍行動的矛盾表述之後，特朗普威脅如果伊朗不完全開放霍爾木茲海峽，將摧毀其能源設施。
briefing.background: 美國與伊朗之間的緊張關係持續升級，特別是在特朗普政府對伊朗的制裁政策以及對其核計劃的強硬立場下。霍爾木茲海峽是全球重要的石油運輸通道，控制該地區的安全對於美國及其盟友至關重要。近期的軍事行動和言辭威脅顯示出美國在應對伊朗挑釁時的策略不斷調整，反映出其在中東地區的政策脈絡。
briefing.analysis: 此次發言顯示出美國在對伊朗政策上的矛盾與不確定性，尤其是在特朗普的強硬威脅與其希望結束戰爭的意圖之間的張力。這一策略的升級可能會引發伊朗的強烈反應，進一步加劇地區緊張局勢。對於美國軍方而言，這意味著可能需要更多的資源與軍事行動來達成其目標，而對於伊朗來說，則可能促使其加強防禦措施或尋求外部支持以應對美國的壓力。

supporting_titles: Iran-Israel war LIVE: Will completely close Strait of Hormuz if U.S. targets power plants, says Iran

economy.title: Gold slides as hawkish Fed and strong US dollar override geopolitical fears
economy.summary: Gold prices have continued to weaken despite escalating tensions in the US-Israel conflict with Iran, breaking from the metal’s traditional role as a geopolitical hedge, as fading expectations of interest rate cuts and a stronger US dollar weigh on sentiment, analysts said. The metal has declined about 15 per cent since a brief surge on March 2, when prices climbed to around US$5,300 per ounce following US and Israeli strikes on Iran. A modest rebound driven by technical buying on Friday did...

briefing.news_focus_zh: 儘管美國與以色列與伊朗之間的緊張局勢加劇，黃金價格仍持續下滑，顯示出其作為地緣政治避險資產的傳統角色受到挑戰。分析指出，聯邦儲備局的鷹派立場及強勁的美元對市場情緒造成壓力。
briefing.background: 黃金通常被視為在地緣政治不穩定時期的避險資產，但近期的市場動態顯示出其傳統角色的變化。隨著美國聯邦儲備局持續採取鷹派政策，市場對降息的預期逐漸減弱，加上美元走強，這些因素共同影響了黃金的需求。自3月2日以來，黃金價格已下跌約15%，顯示出市場對地緣政治風險的反應不如預期。
briefing.analysis: 此次黃金價格的下滑顯示出市場對地緣政治風險的敏感度下降，與以往在衝突加劇時黃金價格上漲的趨勢相悖。美國聯邦儲備局的鷹派立場使得投資者更傾向於持有美元資產，進一步壓制了黃金的吸引力。這一變化可能導致投資者重新評估其資產配置，特別是在面對不確定的地緣政治環境時。未來，若美國經濟數據持續強勁，黃金價格可能面臨進一步下行壓力。

economy.title: ‘The new ketchup’? How hummus spread beyond a niche into a British staple
economy.summary: News that chickpea dip is to join list of products used for UK inflation basket confirms its move into the mainstream The best (and worst) supermarket hummus tasted and rated It is a sign of the times. This week it was revealed that hummus is joining the list of foods used to measure the cost of living in Britain as the ubiquity of the dip at mealtimes sees it billed as the “new ketchup”. The decision to drop a pot of hummus in the inflation basket is a moment for the all-conquering chickpea dip, which arrived on supermarket shelves in the late 1980s. Since then Britons have gone from spending virtually nothing to £170m a year on the versatile stuff. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: News that chickpea dip is to join list of products used for UK inflation basket confirms its move into the mainstream The best (and worst) supermarket hummus tasted and rated It is a sign of the times. Since then Britons have gone from spending virtually nothing to £170m a year on the versatile stuff. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國的鷹嘴豆泥（hummus）被納入通脹指數的食品清單，顯示其已從小眾產品轉變為主流食品，並被稱為‘新番茄醬’。這一變化反映了消費者飲食習慣的演變。
briefing.background: 鷹嘴豆泥自1980年代末進入英國超市以來，逐漸受到消費者的青睞。隨著健康飲食趨勢的興起，鷹嘴豆泥的市場需求顯著增加，英國每年在這一產品上的消費已達1.7億英鎊。此次納入通脹指數，標誌著其在英國飲食文化中的重要性日益上升。
briefing.analysis: 此次鷹嘴豆泥被納入通脹指數，顯示其已成為英國飲食的主流選擇，反映出消費者對健康與多樣化飲食的需求。這一變化可能促使生產商進一步擴大產品線，並提升市場競爭力。同時，這也可能影響其他類似產品的市場定位，促進健康食品的消費趨勢。對於消費者而言，這意味著在通脹計算中，健康選擇將獲得更多關注。

economy.title: HSBC vows to keep investing in China amid global tensions as new trade corridors emerge
economy.summary: HSBC CEO Georges Elhedery has vowed to continue investing in China amid escalating trade tensions after witnessing new trade opportunities from Chinese companies going global. While attending the two-day China Development Forum (CDF) 2026 in Beijing on Sunday, Elhedery characterised China’s current trajectory as a “new phase of development” that would define the next era of global economic growth. Although 2025 saw steady growth in global trade, the landscape was complicated by shifting tariffs,...

briefing.news_focus: HSBC CEO Georges Elhedery has vowed to continue investing in China amid escalating trade tensions after witnessing new trade opportunities from Chinese companies going global. While attending the two-day China Development Forum (CDF) 2026 in Beijing on Sunday, Elhedery characterised China’s current trajectory as a “new phase of development” that would define the next era of global economic growth. Although 2025 saw steady growth in global trade, the landscape was complicated by shifting tariffs,...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 匯豐銀行首席執行官Georges Elhedery在北京的中國發展論壇上表示，儘管全球貿易緊張局勢升級，匯豐仍將持續在中國投資，並指出中國企業的全球化為新貿易機會帶來了潛力。
briefing.background: 隨著全球貿易環境的變化，中國的經濟發展進入新階段，吸引外資的潛力持續增強。匯豐銀行作為全球主要金融機構之一，對中國市場的重視反映了其對中國經濟未來的信心。過去幾年，中國在貿易政策和市場開放方面的調整，促使外資企業重新評估其在中國的投資策略。
briefing.analysis: 此次發言標誌著匯豐在面對全球貿易緊張局勢時，仍堅持其在中國的長期投資計劃，這與其他一些外資企業的觀望態度形成對比。此舉可能會吸引更多外資進入中國市場，進一步促進中資企業的國際化。同時，這也可能引發其他金融機構的競爭，促使它們重新考量在中國的業務策略，尤其是在新貿易走廊的開發上。

theme_of_day: 今日新聞的整體敘事主軸圍繞著科技進步與國際政治緊張局勢之間的相互影響。在科技版面中，Nvidia的演講和美國對機器人網絡的打擊反映了人工智慧和網絡安全的日益重要性，這與政治版面中美國對伊朗的強硬立場及以色列的調查事件形成鮮明對比，顯示出科技與地緣政治的交織影響。此外，經濟版面提及的黃金價格下滑，亦反映出市場對於美國貨幣政策及國際局勢的敏感反應，進一步強化了科技、政治與經濟之間的連動關係。
